name: Exfiltrate an AMI by Sharing It
description: Simulates an attacker sharing an EC2 AMI with an external AWS account, enabling the attacker to launch instances from the victim's machine image and access any data baked into it.
prerequisites: An EC2 AMI owned by the current account
detection_signal: CloudTrail ec2:ModifyImageAttribute event adding a launch permission for an external AWS account ID
